sentiment.summary: Markets in cautious relief as Trump hints Iran conflict may end soon — oil crashing 5.8%, VIX declining to 24, but crypto sits in Extreme Fear and BTC pulls back.

insights.text: Iran fears fade, oil craters 5.8%. Trump signaled a potential end to the US-Iran conflict, sending WTI crude to $89 and VIX down to 24 (-4.8%). Tech stocks catching bids as energy risk premium deflates. Crypto stays in Extreme Fear (F&G: 15).

BTC bleeding — $3,600 below your $73,135 cost basis. Bitcoin at $69,500 (-0.63%), under both the 50-day and 200-day EMAs. Fear & Greed at 15 (Extreme Fear). No technical reversal confirmed. Iran de-escalation could be the catalyst but wait for confirmation.

Rocket Lab up 14.8% from your $62.04 basis. RKLB trading near $71 with record $602M revenue in 2025 (+38% YoY) and $1.85B backlog up 73%. 4th launch of 2026 completed March 6. Silicon solar array unveiled for space-based data centers. Strong Buy consensus, avg PT $69.

S&P 500 inclusion March 23 — forced buying incoming. EchoStar joins the S&P 500 before market open March 23, triggering passive index fund buying. EchoStar XXV satellite launching tonight on Falcon 9. Trading near $110 vs your $114.33 cost basis — nearly flat.

TE ripped 11% today — solar thesis on fire. T1 Energy at $7.98 vs your $6.73 basis (+18.6%). Section 45X manufacturing tax credits confirmed, 900MW supply deal locked in with Treaty Oak. Stock broke above 200-day MA. Avg analyst PT: $10.71. Looking strong.

Seagate stuck 21% below your $448.98 entry — hold the line. STX at $352.80. Q2 revenue strong at $2.83B with 42% gross margins. $0.74 quarterly dividend declared. AI/cloud storage demand is the long-term tailwind. Thesis intact — needs patience to close the gap.

Telesat burning runway before LEO launch. TSAT at $30.84, below your $33.33 cost basis (-7.5%). First Lightspeed LEO satellite launch targeted December 2026. New ground stations added in Quebec and Saskatchewan. Earnings March 26. Pure execution risk until birds fly.

BigBear down 54% from your $9.02 basis — severe pain. BBAI at $4.08. Q4 revenue crashed 37.5% YoY to $27.3M, missing badly. Investigations looming, special stockholder meeting March 18. Ask Sage acquisition adds AI platform optionality. Risk remains very high.

NVIDIA drops $2B bomb on Nebius — today's biggest catalyst. NVIDIA invested $2B in NBIS to deploy 5GW of AI systems by 2030. Missouri AI campus approved, SVP Americas hired. Stock at $97 vs your $131.12 cost basis — still underwater, but deal rerates the story.

Oklo down 54% from your $125 cost basis — painful hold. OKLO near $58, 60% below ATH. Centrus JV for nuclear fuel services announced. Earnings March 17 is the next catalyst. DOE targeting July 4 criticality milestone. Buy consensus, $113 avg PT — but execution risk is real.

Navitas sacrificing revenue to pivot to AI power. NVTS at $8.36, below your $10.00 basis (-16.4%). Q4 revenue crashed 59.4% YoY as company exits low-power business. Showcasing 10kW GaN/SiC solutions at APEC March 22-26. Q1 2026 guide: $8–$8.5M. Watch for design wins.
